title: Mark Corcoran
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Mark Corcoran''' is the illustrator of the [[1979]] children's book, ''[[The Mystery of the Rebellious Robot]]''.

Born in New York City, Corcoran was educated at New York's [[Wikipedia:Parsons The New School for Design|Parsons School of Design]].<ref name="Bio">{{WebCite|url=http://www.aartreps.com/mark.htm|text=Mark Corcoran bio|archivedate=20080117095503}}</ref> Acclaimed children's author and illustrator [[Wikipedia:Maurice Sendak|Maurice Sendak]] was one of his instructors at Parsons.<ref name="booth">{{WordPress|subdomain=johnbooth|url=2009/09/10/the-rebellious-robot-at-30|name=Cornfield Meet|text=The Rebellious Robot at 30|archivedate=20241228114700}}</ref>

In 1978, the 23-year-old artist started work on ''[[The Mystery of the Rebellious Robot]]''. [[Random House]] provided him with a finished story, as well as reference photos from {{Film|IV}} to help with technical details. He describes the process as one with tight deadlines, but one which allowed the inclusion of humor and subtle details in his work. After his work was completed, Random House sent him passes for [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']].<ref name="booth" />

Corcoran has continued his artistic career, including illustrations for textbooks and [[Wikipedia:Highlights for Children|''Highlights for Children'']] magazine.<ref name="booth" /> Outside of his art, Corcoran's interests include the electric guitar and model-making.<ref name="Bio" />

==Star Wars Works==
===Books===
*''[[The Mystery of the Rebellious Robot]]'' ([[1979]])
